candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not the preferred primary interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on interest-bearing liabilities excl lease liabilities

variables.notes: The best semantic match, 'Interest expense on interest-bearing liabilities excl lease liabilities', is present in the Income Statement preview but missing from the candidate list. Added it as the preferred label, with candidate fallback rows after it. Manual review recommended because the reported interest line may vary between a specific interest line and the broader 'Financial expenses' line. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest expense on interest-bearing liabilities excl lease liabilities
